title: bunium bulbocastanum subsp. macuca
intro: Bunium bulbocastanum subsp. macuca, also known as the lesser melilot or sweet melilot, is a sub-species of the Bunium bulbocastanum plant, which is a type of wild carrot native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat digestive issues and its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Bunium bulbocastanum subsp. macuca include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas and infusions made from its roots and leaves, which can be used to treat various health issues.
